title: Elph AI provider configuration
description: One provider per JSON file in ~/.elph/providers. The provider id is the filename without .json.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI.

apiKey.description: API key literal, $ENV_VAR / ${ENV_VAR} / env.ENV_VAR interpolation, or !command.

authHeader.description: Add Authorization: Bearer <apiKey> header for OpenAI-compatible APIs.

headers.description: Extra request headers. Values support $ENV_VAR, ${ENV_VAR}, env.ENV_VAR, and !command syntax.

id.description: Model identifier sent to the upstream API.

name.description: Human-readable model name. Defaults to id.

api.description: Override provider api for this model.

baseUrl.description: Override provider baseUrl for this model.

reasoning.description: Whether the model supports extended thinking.

contextWindow.description: Maximum context window size in tokens for this model.

maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per completion for this model.
